figures.caption: Fig. 3: Architecture of AlertStar. Qualifier pairs are aggregated into UQ and used as key/value in MHA with er as query, producing ẽr . Two branches — cross-attention and path-composition — are fused via a trainable gate α = σ(g) into z, scored against candidate tails via dot product.
